objects.pedestal: A steel pedestal bolted to the floor. A journal rests at its center.
objects.journal: The leather journal is dry and brittle. Your initials are pressed into the cover.
objects.door: The vault door is sealed from this side, but a recessed panel is hidden in the frame.
objects.panel: A narrow keypad panel sits flush with the steel. It has no labels, only a blinking cursor.

use.response: You read the brittle pages. Most are blank, except for one repeated note: {vault_hint}
You flip the journal again. The same repeated hint stares back at you.
You press against the pedestal. A hidden panel slides open beside the door, revealing a keypad.
The exposed keypad waits silently for a code.
Nothing shifts. There might be a clue in the journal first.

enter.response: The keypad flashes green. Massive bolts retract, opening a narrow route onward.
The keypad rejects the entry with a low buzz.
There is nowhere to enter a code yet.
